scrap.name: Scrap
scrap.description: Salvaged scrap metal. Cheap and fast to place, but brittle.

iron.name: Iron
iron.description: Standard structural iron. Reliable and balanced.

copper.name: Copper
copper.description: Conductive copper. Better as wiring than walls.

steel.name: Steel
steel.description: Reinforced steel plating. Tough but heavy.

titanium.name: Titanium
titanium.description: Lightweight titanium alloy. Excellent durability-to-weight ratio.

concrete.name: Concrete
concrete.description: Poured concrete block. Heavy and moderately tough.

composite.name: Composite
composite.description: Advanced composite laminate. Light and very durable.

silicon.name: Silicon
silicon.description: Silicon wafer block. Fragile but essential for electronics.

processor.name: Processor
processor.description: Advanced processor chip. Extremely fragile and valuable.

crystal.name: Crystal
crystal.description: Energy crystal. Resonates with power systems.

power_core.name: Power Core
power_core.description: Concentrated power core. Handle with extreme care.
